mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, unread_count AS unreadCount, last_read_seq AS lastReadSeq, is_top AS isTop, is_mute AS isMute, deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_conversation_user WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, unread_count AS unreadCount, last_read_seq AS lastReadSeq, is_top AS isTop, is_mute AS isMute, deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM im_conversation_user WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
